yogurt-and-coconut-tart-teleculinaria.name: Yogurt And Coconut Tart
instructions: Light a pot with water and sugar, boil for 5 minutes and turn off the fire. Unroll the sanded dough and place it in a tart (27 cm in diameter), keeping the vegetable paper underneath. Adjust the dough well to the tart and eliminate the edge.

In a bowl, mix the yolks with the egg and the Greek yogurts. Add the coconut, flour, lemon and cinnamon and stir well. Then add the sugar syrup, in yarn and always stirring. Throw this one in the pie and smooth it out.
Take the pie to the oven, preheated to 200oC, for about 20 minutes. Remove it from the oven and let it cool. Unform and serve it cold or at room temperature, sprinkled with a little grated coconut.

yogurt-cake-123-the-easiest-and-fluffies.name: Yogurt Cake 1,2,3 The Easiest And Fluffiest Cake!
yogurt-cake-123-the-easiest-and-fluffies.original_name: Bizcocho de yogur 1,2,3 ¡el bizcocho casero más fácil y esponjoso!

ingredients.item: 1 medida (con el vasito de yogur) de aceite de girasol
3 medidas (con el vasito de yogur) de harina
1 sobre (16g) de levadura en polvo o polvo de hornear
Mantequilla o margarina para engrasar el molde

instructions: The basis of this recipe is to measure the yoghurt vessel, which greatly facilitates the issue of ingredients. The ideal thing is to use lemon yogurt because it gives them a special flavour, but if they don't have one we could use a natural and put some lemon grilling to add some flavour to the biscuit.
We purify the oven at 180 ° C.. We put the lemon yogurt into a bowl and we use the vessel as a measure.
Incorporamos una medida de aceite de girasol.
We also add 2 measures of sugar using the yogurt vessel.
We have been billing everything using an electrical mixer, until the sugar completely dissolve.
Finally we add 3 cups of flour and an overlay of billing powder or powder.

We hit everything till we have a soft and pitted mass. When we have a homogeneous and fine mass, we turn about a detachable mold, to which we have been tipped with butter and sprinkled with flour so that then it will be easy to remove the biscuit.
We baked for 30-35 minutes at 180 ° C, or till we see that the tip of a knife goes clear as we pinch at the centre of the biscuit.

yogurt-marinated-chicken-kebabs-with-ale.name: Yogurt-marinated Chicken Kebabs With Aleppo Pepper

ingredients.item: Aleppo pepper* or 2 teaspoons dried crushed red pepper plus 2 teaspoons hungarian sweet paprika
ingredients.prep: plus additional Aleppo pepper or paprika for sprinkling

ingredients.item: Unpeeled lemons; 1 thinly sliced into rounds
Skinless boneless chicken (thighs and/or breast halves)

instructions: If using Aleppo pepper, place in large bowl and mix in 1 tablespoon warm water. Let stand until thick paste forms, about 5 minutes. If using dried crushed red pepper and paprika combination, place in large bowl and stir in 2 tablespoons warm water and let stand until paste forms, about 5 minutes. Add yogurt, olive oil, red wine vinegar, tomato paste, 2 teaspoons coarse salt, and 1 teaspoon black pepper to spice mixture in bowl; whisk to blend. Stir in garlic and lemon slices, then chicken. Cover and chill at least 1 hour. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Prepare barbecue (medium-high heat). Thread chicken pieces on metal skewers, dividing equally. Discard marinade in bowl. Sprinkle each skewer with salt, pepper, and additional Aleppo pepper or paprika. Brush grill rack with oil. Grill chicken until golden brown and cooked through, turning skewers occasionally, 10 to 12 minutes total. Transfer skewers to platter. Surround with lemon wedges and serve.

yummy-pumpkin-pie.name: Yummy Pumpkin Pie
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine custard mix, brown sugar, and pumpkin pie spice. Mix well, then add pumpkin, condensed milk, and egg. Whisk mixture until smooth, then cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil. Boil and stir 1 minute.
Pour mixture into baked pastry shell and chill. Garnish with whipped topping before serving.
